title: Haunted Harbor
writer: Royal K. Cole, Basil Dickey, Jesse Duffy
actors: Kane Richmond, Kay Aldridge, Roy Barcroft
plot: A sea captain about to be hanged for a murder he didn't commit is rescued from the gallows by two of his crewmen. They head for the island of Pulinan, where they believe the real murderer--the captain's former partner--is hiding s...
